concepts.disambiguation: In this repo, 'payment' refers to the Stripe-backed billing service at services/billing/. 'Invoice' is a specific billing artifact, not a separate system.
'Auth' covers JWT verification, session management, OAuth, and password reset — all in services/auth/. 'Session' is a subset of auth, not a separate concept.
'Notification' is the unified multi-channel delivery system at services/notifications/. Individual channels (email, Slack, in-app) are delivery backends, not separate systems.
'Webhook' in this repo is the outbound event delivery system at services/webhooks/. Inbound webhooks from Stripe are handled by services/billing/webhooks/.
All runtime validation MUST go through packages/validation/ per ADR-007. Do not create inline validators in service files.
